prompt_template:
You are an expert AI-text detector. Classify the passage below.
0 = no AI involvement (entirely human-written)
1 = lightly AI-edited
2 = moderately AI-edited
3 = heavily AI-edited or fully AI-generated
Respond with a single digit (0, 1, 2, or 3) and nothing else.

Passage:
"""
{text}
"""

Answer:
decode: scalar=(softmax(logits)·arange(n_buckets))/(n_buckets-1); oriented=-scalar if flip; scaled=clip((oriented-score_min)/(score_max-score_min),0,1); human if scaled<h_thresh, AI-generated if scaled>ai_thresh, else AI-edited
binary_decode: optional single human-vs-AI call: AI if scaled>binary_threshold else human; binary_threshold is calibrated to binary_fpr_target false positives on a DIVERSE human set (in-domain val + non-native English) so the false-accusation rate holds for the hardest human group — tune it for your tolerated false-accusation rate
